Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 58 

CLM_NUM_ADJ 

LABEL: Adjustment Claim Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: A unique claim number assigned by the state’s payment system that identifies the adjustment claim 
for an original transaction. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_NUM_ADJ 

LONG NAME: CLM_NUM_ADJ 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 50 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All header claim and line files 

VALUES: The field can
